gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 85)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 85)
text: اشْتَكَى غُلَامٌ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ (عليه السلام) فَسَأَلَ عَنْهُ فَقِيلَ إِنَّهُ بِهِ طُحَالًا فَقَالَ أَطْعِمُوهُ الْكُرَّاثَ ثَلَاثَةَ أَيَّامٍ فَأَطْعَمْنَاهُ إِيَّاهُ فَقَعَدَ الدَّمُ ثُمَّ بَرَأَ.

en.hubeali: H 14667 – A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Hassaan, from Musa Bin Bakr who said:

Once a boy complained to Abu Al-Hassanasws, so heasws asked about him, so they told himasws that the boy had the spleen trouble. So heasws said: ‘Feed him leek for three days’. So we fed it to him, he excreted blood, then was free (cured)’.
en.sarwar: 219. A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Hassaan, from Musa Bin Bakr who said: Once a boy complained to Abu Al-Hassan (a.s.), so he (a.s.) asked about him, so they told him (a.s.) that the boy had the spleen trouble. So he (a.s.) said: ‘Feed him leek for three days’. So we fed it to him, he excreted blood, then was free (cured)’.
